$comment: test: generate a Go implementation AND a test for a task, then verify BEHAVIOR with go vet + go test (the go_test oracle), repairing ONCE if vet/tests fail. generate -> check -> done | fix -> recheck -> done | fail. Bounded, unrolled repair (no cycle) so it lints clean and terminates. The chain is named `test` (not `go_test`) because the flat namespace forbids a chain and a tool sharing a name; the oracle tool is `go_test`.
summary: Generate a Go implementation plus a test for a task, verify it with `go vet` + `go test` (behavior, not just compile), and repair once if it fails.
